expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and policy: "Focus (blocking): supporting issues stay `context_only_no_defect_analysis` and produce summaries" and "Support-only Jira policy: supporting Jira issues are context evidence only and must remain `context_only_no_defect_analysis`." It also enumerates the required supporting-issue summary and relation-map artifacts under context/.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md frame the artifact as Phase 1: execution_notes.md: "./outputs/result.md (phase1-focused benchmark artifact)" and result.md: "Primary phase under test: phase1" plus "Benchmark artifact: Phase 1 contract check" and a Phase 1 outputs/--post validation discussion.
